inputs.label: Mass of Object 1
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the first object in the collision.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the first object in the collision.

inputs.label: Initial Velocity of Object 1
inputs.businessContext: Initial velocity of object 1 before collision, positive direction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial velocity of object 1 before collision, positive direction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesne 1'in çarpışmadan önceki başlangıç hızı, pozitif yön.

inputs.label: Mass of Object 2
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the second object in the collision.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the second object in the collision.

inputs.label: Initial Velocity of Object 2
inputs.businessContext: Initial velocity of object 2 before collision, negative if opposite direction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial velocity of object 2 before collision, negative if opposite direction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesne 2'nin çarpışmadan önceki başlangıç hızı, ters yönde ise negatif.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Restitution
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of relative speed after collision to before collision. Range 0 to 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of relative speed after collision to before collision. Range 0 to 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpışma sonrası bağıl hızın çarpışma öncesine oranı. 0 ile 1 arasında.

formulas.finalVelocity1: ( (mass1 - restitutionCoefficient * mass2) * velocity1Initial + mass2 * (1 + restitutionCoefficient) * velocity2Initial ) / (mass1 + mass2)
formulas.finalVelocity2: ( mass1 * (1 + restitutionCoefficient) * velocity1Initial + (mass2 - restitutionCoefficient * mass1) * velocity2Initial ) / (mass1 + mass2)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
